findings.question: Does the linked page show the item exists with a visible price?
findings.note: The provider blocked automated access (an anti-bot or CAPTCHA check was shown instead of the page), so the product and price could not be verified automatically. A reviewer should open the page manually to confirm the details.

findings.question: Is the item on the OTPS exclusion list? (see guidelines)
findings.note: No overlap found between 'Weighted blanket (therapeutic)' and the configured exclusion list. This supports (but does not by itself prove) that the item is not excluded.

findings.question: Is 'Other goods & services that increase independence' approved in the budget?
findings.note: Requires the participant's approved Self-Direction budget record for this OTPS budget line.

findings.question: Is 'Other goods & services that increase health and safety' approved in the budget?
findings.note: Requires the participant's approved Self-Direction budget record for this OTPS budget line.

findings.question: Is the item related to a need or goal identified in the Life Plan?
findings.note: Requires the participant's Life Plan and reviewer judgment on whether this item supports an identified need or goal.

findings.question: Will the item increase the independence and/or health and safety of the individual?
findings.note: Requires participant-specific context from the Life Plan — not determinable from a product page.

findings.question: Is the item exclusively needed for the participant?
findings.note: Requires confirmation from the FI Coordinator/Broker that the item is not shared with other household members.

findings.question: Can the item be funded through other sources? (must be NO)
findings.note: Requires knowledge of other funding sources (e.g. E-mods/assistive technology) available to the participant — not determinable from a product page.

findings.question: Was the same item bought already in this budget year? (must be NO)
findings.note: Requires the participant's purchase history for the current budget year, which isn't available from the website or this form alone.

findings.question: Invoice-rule context: OTPS is capped at $3,000 per budget year.
findings.note: Requires cumulative OTPS spending records for the current budget year, which aren't available from a single submission or the item's page.
